subcodes.first_line: Rejoice, O My handmaiden, for My Most Exalted Pen maketh mention of thee in the prison of 'Akká, wherewith the fragrance of the All-Merciful hath been wafted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان افرحی یا امتی بما یذکرک قلمی الاعلی فی سجن عکاء بما فاح به عرف الرحمن فی
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement
